meta.summary: csvtk command-line toolkit for reproducible CSV/TSV table processing.
meta.description: csvtk command-line toolkit for reproducible CSV/TSV table processing.

test: csvtk --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'csvtk v0.37.0' >/dev/null && csvtk --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'CSV/TSV toolkit' >/dev/null && csvtk summary --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'summary statistics' >/dev/null && csvtk join --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'join files by selected fields' >/dev/null && csvtk csv2xlsx --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'convert CSV/TSV files to XLSX file' >/dev/null && csvtk plot --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'plot common figures' >/dev/null && { ldd $(command -v csvtk) 2>&1 || true; } | grep -E '(not a dynamic executable|statically linked)' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-csvtk-basic-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cd "$tmp"; printf 'sample,group,count
s1,A,10
s2,A,12
s3,B,7
s4,B,9
' > table.csv; csvtk dim table.csv > dim.txt; grep -F 'table.csv' dim.txt >/dev/null; grep -F 'num_rows' dim.txt >/dev/null; csvtk cut -f sample,count table.csv > cut.csv; grep -F 'sample,count' cut.csv >/dev/null; csvtk filter2 -f '$count >= 10' table.csv > filtered.csv; grep -F 's2,A,12' filtered.csv >/dev/null; csvtk summary -f count:sum -g group table.csv > summary.csv; grep -F 'A,22.00' summary.csv >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-csvtk-transform-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cd "$tmp"; printf 'id,name,score
1,Alice,8
2,Bob,11
3,Carol,9
' > meta.csv; csvtk csv2tab meta.csv > meta.tsv; grep -F 'id	name	score' meta.tsv >/dev/null; csvtk -t tab2csv meta.tsv > round.csv; grep -F '2,Bob,11' round.csv >/dev/null; csvtk csv2json meta.csv > meta.json; grep -F '"name": "Alice"' meta.json >/dev/null; csvtk csv2md meta.csv > meta.md; grep -F '|1  |Alice|8' meta.md >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-csvtk-join-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cd "$tmp"; printf 'id,sample
1,s1
2,s2
3,s3
' > samples.csv; printf 'id,value
1,10
2,20
4,40
' > values.csv; csvtk join -f id samples.csv values.csv > joined.csv; grep -F '1,s1,10' joined.csv >/dev/null; csvtk freq -f id joined.csv > freq.csv; grep -F '1,1' freq.csv >/dev/null; csvtk pretty joined.csv > pretty.txt; grep -F 'sample' pretty.txt >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-csvtk-compress-xlsx-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cd "$tmp"; printf 'id,value
1,10
2,20
' > data.csv; csvtk csv2xlsx data.csv -o data.xlsx; test -s data.xlsx; csvtk xlsx2csv data.xlsx > from_xlsx.csv; grep -F '2,20' from_xlsx.csv >/dev/null; csvtk csv2tab data.csv | csvtk -t csv2xlsx -o data-tsv.xlsx; test -s data-tsv.xlsx; csvtk cat data.csv -o data.csv.lz4; test -s data.csv.lz4; csvtk headers data.csv.lz4 > headers.txt; grep -F 'value' headers.txt >/dev/null

upstream.name: csvtk
upstream.citation: No dedicated csvtk paper was found in the upstream README; cite the upstream project and version.
